assertions.assertion: Configures UseForwardedHeaders with ForwardedHeaders.XForwardedFor and ForwardedHeaders.XForwardedProto
assertions.rationale: Standard ASP.NET Core reverse proxy knowledge

assertions.assertion: Places UseForwardedHeaders before UseAuthentication in the middleware pipeline
Configures UsePathBase('/app') for the sub-path mount
assertions.rationale: UsePathBase is standard ASP.NET Core knowledge for sub-path hosting

assertions.assertion: Mentions SameSite cookie configuration (Lax for cross-site IDP) as a potential contributing factor
assertions.rationale: The specific interplay between SameSite and BFF OIDC callbacks is a nuanced issue that general knowledge might not cover
